_comment: Curated subset of the docs tree for tooling. Auto-generation lives in docs/_inventory/scripts/inventory.py; this file is regenerated post-Phase-D-merge with --curated flag. Until that script is updated, this is a hand-written skeleton matching INDEX.md.

_schema.buckets: Map of bucket-name → {description, files: [{path, summary, role}]}

01-orientation.description: First-touch onboarding for new contributors. ≤3 files at a time.

02-reference.description: Durable reference (specs, ADRs, framework docs). Stable; updated rarely.

files.summary: Full dev plan with multi-agent validation framework
Railway config, env vars, common deploy issues
What the system actually does today (vs the spec)

_reports.description: Historical reports — preserved for audit, not maintained.

STATUS.description: Live session state. Updated every session.

files.summary: Single source of truth for non-ADR decisions

_meta.description: Agent-instruction meta (load order, handoff templates, session checklists).

files.summary: Which 2-3 docs to read for whatever task
Reusable session-kickoff and task-handoff prompt templates

_archive.description: Frozen content. Never edited after archival.

subdirs.orchestrator-prompts: 16 one-shot orchestrator prompts (PHASE-0..5, UI-A..C, REMEDIATION-1..2, etc.)
subdirs.research-wave-3-reviews: 4 wave-3 reviewer outputs from the 18-agent pipeline

roadmap.description: OmniMind memory-system roadmap (151-file pipeline output). Treated as a self-contained subtree.

top-level-meta.description: Top-level platform documentation that doesn't fit a single bucket.

files.summary: This index — categorized map of the docs tree
Machine-readable subset of the docs tree (this file)
Code prefixes, statuses, modes, persona names

non_curated_dirs._comment: Directories present in docs/ but not enumerated above. The full file list lives in docs/_inventory/files.json and the live tree.
